mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_games(room_id, room_name, creator_id, required_members, current_members, status, group_avatar) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{creator.userId}, #{requiredMembers}, #{currentMembers}, #{status}, #{groupAvatar})
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_games
room_name = #{roomName}, creator_id = #{creator.id}, required_members = #{requiredMembers}, current_members = #{currentMembers}, status = #{status}, group_avatar = #{groupAvatar},
UPDATE chat_games SET status = #{status} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_games WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar FROM chat_game_members cm LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cm.member_id = u.user_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId}
